name: Storage Location Configuration for Chemical Inventory
description:
Create a new facility record in EPA Tier2 Submit and add a hazardous chemical (Sulfuric Acid) with two detailed storage locations.

Facility Details:
- Facility Name: Precision Metal Finishing Inc
- Street Address: 4200 Industrial Boulevard
- City: Baton Rouge
- State: LA
- County: East Baton Rouge
- ZIP Code: 70805
- Latitude: 30.4715 / Longitude: -91.1871
- NAICS Code: 332813
- Max Full-Time Employees: 45

Owner/Operator:
- Name: Precision Metal Finishing Inc
- Phone: 225-555-0142
- Type: Private

Emergency Contact:
- Name: Robert Thibodaux
- Title: EHS Manager
- Phone: 225-555-0143

Chemical Inventory:
- Chemical Name: Sulfuric Acid
- CAS Number: 7664-93-9
- EHS (Extremely Hazardous Substance): Yes
- Physical Hazards: Corrosive to metals, Oxidizer
- Health Hazards: Acute (Immediate), Chronic (Delayed)
- Maximum Daily Amount: 75000 lbs
- Average Daily Amount: 50000 lbs
- Days On Site: 365

Storage Location 1:
- Storage Type: Above ground tank
- Temperature: Ambient temperature
- Pressure: Ambient pressure
- Location Description: Tank Farm - North Yard, Tanks T-101 and T-102

Storage Location 2:
- Storage Type: Plastic or non-metallic drum
- Temperature: Ambient temperature
- Pressure: Ambient pressure
- Location Description: Building 3 - Plating Line Chemical Storage

When finished, export/save the submission file as 'precision_metal_t2.t2s' directly in your 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents' folder.
